text: The system shall provide the user the capability to send e-mail messages.
The system shall provide the user the capability to receive e-mail messages.
The system shall provide the user the capability to delete e-mail messages.
The system shall support the transmission of e-mail attachments.
The system shall provide the user the capability to reply to e-mail messages.
The system shall provide the user the capability to forward e-mail messages.
The system shall provide the user the capability to print e-mail messages.
The system shall provide a text editor for the formatting of e-mail content.
The system shall provide the user the capability to establish automatic reply rules.
The system shall provide the user the capability to establish out-of-office notification rules.
The system shall provide the user the capability to establish rules for the temporary transfer of e-mail.
The system shall provide the user the capability to move e-mails into inbox folders.
The system shall provide a spell check function for e-mail content creation.
The system shall provide the user the capability to organize e-mail content into personal folders.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to migrate existing public folders into the enterprise system.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to create public folders for information sharing.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to manage public folders for information sharing.
The system shall provide the user the capability to create contact lists.
The system shall provide the user the capability to import contact lists from external sources.
The system shall provide the user the capability to export contact lists.
The system shall provide the user the capability to share contact lists.
The system shall provide the user the capability to share address books.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to create distribution lists.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to share distribution lists.
The system shall create query-based distribution lists from LDAP-compliant directory services.
The system shall provide the user the capability to create multiple calendars.
The system shall provide the user the capability to customize calendar views.
The system shall provide the user the capability to schedule conference room resources.
The system shall provide the user the capability to schedule teleconference resources.
The system shall provide the user the capability to create reminders.
The system shall provide the user the capability to create tasks.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to provision e-mail accounts.
The system shall integrate e-mail account provisioning with LDAP-compliant directory services.
The system shall provide the user the capability to search for e-mails based on age and size.
The system shall provide the user the capability to search for e-mails based on sender and recipient.
The system shall provide the user the capability to search for e-mails based on subject and keyword.
The system shall provide the user the capability to search for e-mails based on attachment content.
The system shall auto-enforce standard conventions for account creation.
The system shall auto-enforce standard conventions for distribution list creation.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to control message size limits.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to create generic e-mail accounts for multi-user access.
The system shall provide the user the capability to customize the client application view by arranging fields.
The system shall provide the user the capability to archive e-mails at the desktop.
The system shall provide the agency admin a server-based archiving solution.
The system shall archive e-mail data at regularly defined intervals.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to search the archive repository.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to forward items from the archive.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to print items from the archive.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to restore archive items in bulk.
The system shall provide archiving filters based on sender, recipient, date, and subject.
The system shall provide archiving filters based on content, attachments, and keywords.
The system shall provide a long-term retention repository separate from the active e-mail system.
The system shall provide users the capability to search their specific portion of the archive repository.
The system must comply with federal regulations for retention including HIPAA and Sarbanes-Oxley.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to satisfy legal discovery requests.
The system shall capture all e-mails sent and received within the organization into the archive.
The system shall provide the capability to set retention periods for specific e-mails.
The system shall provide a search capability for the e-mail header including Date, From, Subject, To, and CC.
The system shall provide a search capability for the e-mail body text.
The system shall provide a full-text search capability including headers, bodies, and attachments.
The system shall produce responsive e-mails into a specified location for redaction.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to move older data to tiered storage.
The system shall provide the capability to import data from PST and NSF files into the archive.
The system shall provide the capability to place discovery search results on legal hold.
The system shall provide authorized users the capability to review and mark discovery search results.
The system shall provide search capability using Boolean fields.
The system shall perform archiving based on policy definitions including e-mail address and group.
The system shall provide the user the capability to flag e-mails for deletion meeting retention per s.119.021(2)(c).
The system shall provide the user the capability to flag individual e-mails to be excluded from archiving.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to recover data at the file level.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to recover all system messages.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to recover a specific e-mail message.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to recover data by mailbox.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to recover data based on a specific time.
The system shall maintain event logs for backup and restore activities.
The system shall provide the capability to restore backups without service interruption.
The system shall provide pre-emptive e-mail virus protection via scanning prior to server delivery.
The system shall provide pre-emptive e-mail content filtering prior to server delivery.
The system shall provide the capability to whitelist senders by domain or IP address.
The system shall provide the capability to blacklist senders by domain or IP address.
The system shall block e-mail messages based on multiple message attributes.
The system shall allow e-mail messages based on multiple message attributes.
The system shall integrate antispam and antivirus services with LDAP-compliant directory services.
The system shall provide statistical reports for antispam and antivirus activities.
The system shall provide the user the capability to encrypt outbound e-mail.
The system shall establish TLS encryption with specified businesses or customers.
The system shall protect the reputation of outbound mail gateways.
The system shall protect internal e-mail customer identity.
The system shall provide the user secure web-based access to the mailbox, calendar, and address book.
The system shall provide the user secure client-based access to the mailbox, calendar, and address book.
The system shall support e-mail access using Blackberry devices.
The system shall support e-mail access using non-Blackberry mobile data devices.
The system shall support the ActiveSync mobile device protocol.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to manage Blackberry accounts.
The system shall provide access to mailbox components via a web browser over an encrypted connection.
The system shall provide the user the capability to send e-mails within workflow applications.
The system shall provide the user the capability to receive e-mails within workflow applications.
The system shall integrate resource reservations into the e-mail system.
The system shall provide an SMTP bridgehead for agency applications.
The system shall integrate agency applications into the e-mail and mobile messaging environments.
The system shall perform real-time replication of e-mail data to an alternate site.
The system shall perform near-time replication of e-mail data to an alternate site.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to fail-over the mail system to an alternate site.
The system shall provide the data center admin the capability to fail-over e-mail clients to an alternate site.
The system shall provide the user the capability to manually archive e-mails to the server.
The system shall provide the agency admin the capability to electronically redact information from archives.
The system shall provide the capability to digitally certify archive search results.
The system shall catalog responsive e-mail by case for electronic certification of production.
The system shall maintain markings for privileged search results.
The system shall provide a full audit trail of the discovery and review process.
The system shall provide the capability to retrieve quarantined messages.
The system shall provide the capability to add digital signatures to e-mail.
The system shall provide user access to the e-mail archive.
The system shall support wireless services integrated with GIS.
The system shall provide a fax service integrated into e-mail.
The system shall integrate telephone messaging (VOIP) into the e-mail environment.
The system shall provide a List Server option for internal and external report publishing.
The system shall provide the capability to integrate directory services with external systems.
The system shall provide RSS feeds.
